key_themes: Record defense order backlog and strong revenue growth
European/NATO defense spending tailwinds and contract wins
Margin expansion with robust balance sheet and visibility
Valuation debate after multi-year rally and recent pullback
summary: Kongsberg Gruppen (KBGGY), the Norwegian defense, aerospace, and maritime technology leader, shows positive sentiment fueled by record order backlog (>NOK 157bn), consistent double-digit revenue growth, and expanding margins amid surging European defense demand. The demerger of its Maritime segment (listing ~April 23, 2026) is a major catalyst expected to unlock value by creating a high-multiple pure-play defense business focused on missiles, subsea, and aerospace. While the ADR has seen massive multi-year gains (3yr ~376%) followed by volatility from highs near $89 to ~$21 currently, investor discussions highlight its strategic moat (e.g. F-35 missiles) and visibility, outweighing recent mixed analyst notes and valuation concerns.
sources: 25+ web/news sources (Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, Morningstar, company IR, TipRanks), ~10 relevant recent X posts on earnings, spin-off, and contracts, Investor discussions (Reddit r/ValueInvesting)
